text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: ngie

Log:
  Don't expect :test_large_inputs to fail with i386 anymore

  Recent changes (maybe a side-effect of the ATF-ification in r314649)
  invalidate the failure expectation.

  MFC after:	1 week
